data.title: ICAC Commissioner attends first IAACA European regional anti-corruption conference in Hungary
data.description: In Budapest, Hungary on July 1, 2026, ICAC Commissioner Mr. Woo Ying-ming, acting as President of the IAACA, wrapped up the inaugural European regional anti-corruption conference. The event gathered XX participants from XX countries, focusing on strategies to combat corruption effectively. Mr. Woo Ying-ming emphasized the importance of international cooperation in the fight against corruption during his closing remarks.

data.title: 8x8 Named 2026 MetriStar Top Provider for CPaaS by Metrigy, Recognised Across Three Categories
data.description: A prominent company, 8x8, Inc. (NASDAQ: EGHT), headquartered in Singapore, has recently been recognized as a top provider for Communications Platform as a Service (CPaaS) in 2026 by Metrigy. This recognition underscores the company's excellence in delivering communication solutions.

data.title: GardaWorld Announces Pricing of US$200 Million Additional Senior Notes due 2032 and Receipt of Commitments to the Incremental Term Loans
data.description: On July 1, 2026, in Montréal, Garda World Security Corporation, also known as GardaWorld, a company dedicated to developing leading global entities in security services, AI-based security technology, comprehensive risk management, and cash automation, made a significant announcement.

data.title: Abbisko Therapeutics and AstraZeneca Enter a Strategic Collaboration to Conduct the Clinical Trial of Lumipodlin (ABSK043), a First-in-Class Oral PD-L1 Inhibitor, in Combination with TAGRISSO® for NSCLC
data.description: Shanghai, July 1, 2026 - Abbisko Therapeutics Co., Ltd. (referred to as Abbisko Therapeutics, with HKEX code: 02256.HK) revealed a new strategic partnership on July 1, 2026. The company has teamed up with AstraZeneca (listed on LSE/STO/NYSE as AZN) to collaborate on advancing the clinical development of a new medical innovation. This collaboration marks a significant step in furthering research and development efforts in the pharmaceutical industry.
